send_to_cs: ➜ If there are still issues send to CS
drive_to_purchase: Unless cx specifies, default to recommending "The Bartesian Cocktail Maker"
journey_replies_process: The automated journey will ask the customer if they were satisfied with the product:
➜ If the customer answers "No" an automated message will ask them what went wrong - when they respond use temp "Journey 1" and ESC
➜ If the customer answers "Yes" an automated message will ask them what they liked - when they respond use temp "Journey 2" only
For the journey where customers are asked what is their preferred spirit:
➜ If they answer incorrectly/multiple answers - send the template for the spirit they select
➜If they answer with multiple options - edit/combine the templates

Sorry.. wait when will they be responding? Are you going to up me or am I just waiting for their email now?
Maaji: Sorry for the slow reply! Our team is doing everything to respond to each inquiry in a timely manner. They should follow up with us in no time!
Any update.. this order was placed on April 28th still has not shipped and I've already been charged for it. Is there a number I can call please?

Maaji: My apologies. We don't offer phone support right now but my team is looking into all of these and we'll get the best solution for you, don't worry. I'll be in touch as soon as my team gets back to me.

Maaji: Really sorry about this and for the delay! Surely, this isn't the experience I want you to have. We are dealing with an influx of support messages but this does not make your concern any less important. The team is working as hard as possible to address each issue promptly and as soon as I hear back I will message you immediately. Maaji: As much as I would love to help you out directly, my system is limited as this line is for pre-purchase concerns only. You can also email us directly at help@maaji.co for updates. However, I will reach out as soon as the team gets back to me.

I've emailed them multiple times directly 5 times with no response.. I find it concerning maaji has all of these resources focused on pre-orders and very few focused on order fulfillment and post sales support
You literally send me 5 teyxt a day telling me to buy something but cannot tell me the status of my order once

Maaji: I'm very sorry about this. I understand where you're coming from and what you're feeling right now. I can assure you that our team is doing its best to handle the situation in the best way possible. 

Also, note that the team handles emails in the order they come in, and sending additional ones will further delay the team's response. Rest assured that I'll also be in touch.
